tool_input.command:
cat knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-bean-validation.json | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
for s in data.get('sections', []):
    sid = s.get('section_id', '')
    title = s.get('title', '')
    if sid in ['s11', 's12', 's1', 's5', 's6', 's7', 's8', 's16']:
        print(f'=== {sid}: {title} ===')
        print(s.get('content', '')[:2000])
        print()
"
